name: Spice Mylk
intro: During wintertime, spices are great for raising body heat and increasing circulation. You can also warm the mylk in a saucepan till it’s lukewarm; use your finger to check the temperature—it works great. Spiced mylk is the perfect snack when you’re craving something but aren’t really hungry.
method: Mix everything together in a cup or in a saucepan. Drink as is, or warm it carefully till it reaches body temperature.
